work_unit: MM-M007: drop unused _notifications broadcast sender clone in engine spawn
situation: engine.rs L286 cloned state.notifications (broadcast::Sender) into `_notifications` binding that was never read. The extra ref kept the sender alive past the actor loop, so recv() never observed channel-close and the 'engine actor shutdown' log could not fire when all EngineHandles were dropped. Audit finding MM-M007 (priority 10, route-fix).
action: Removed the unused `let _notifications = state.notifications.clone();` line. Spawned task no longer holds a redundant sender copy; channel closes naturally on last handle drop.
outcome_evidence: Commit 77f7f30 in auto/opt-moni-engine-1782949388: 1 file changed, 1 deletion(-). Worktree now has 7 commits (MM-M005/M006/M007 stacked). Main restored to pre-edit state via git checkout.
next_suggestion: 派生 fix MM-M008 (priority 11): llm.rs L164-179 silent fallback to MockLlmClient when DeepSeek key missing — factor mining produces fake outputs. 应加 env var guard + explicit error log。
opt-moni-engine-1782949388 已累积 7 提交（含 M005/M006/M007），建议用户审阅后 merge 以释放 cp-guard 阻塞。
